name: kodim-api
description: Kodim Tech internal Claude Code plugins for core-web-api

plugins.name: api-dev
plugins.description: Senior Rails Developer for core-web-api. End-to-end flow via /api-dev:ship (Notion → plan → execute TDD → PR → signoff) with 2 human checkpoints. Also provides /api-dev:plan, /api-dev:execute, /api-dev:pr-signoff as standalone skills. Includes annotaterb and doppler hooks.
